title: gladiolus segetum var. infestus
intro: Gladiolus segetum var. infestus, also known as wild gladiolus or infested corn gladiolus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the iris family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gladiolus segetum var. infestus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in tinctures and ointments.
